title: mattiastrum velutinum
intro: Mattiastrum velutinum is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the silky matthiola or silky matthiola. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and fighting off infections. Herbal preparations of Mattiastrum velutinum may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
